---
id: SO_P018
title: Directory Structure Governance
subtitle: Strict control over directory and file creation in core system folders
category: Structure Organization
type: Principle
status: Active
version: "1.3"
created: 2025-12-26
last_updated: 2026-02-11
related_principles: [MP011, MP014, SO_R001]
implementation_spec: SO_P018_governance_spec.yaml
---

## Statement

Core system directories (`00_principles/` and `global_scripts/`) AND the **project root directory** MUST have a fixed, documented structure. Both directories AND root-level files require governance. New directories or file patterns require explicit principle approval before creation.

> **Update (2026-02-11):** Issue tracking source of truth is **GitHub Issues**.  
> Local `changelog/issues/` is legacy archive only.

## Implementation Specification

For detailed, machine-readable specifications, see the companion file:
**`SO_P018_governance_spec.yaml`** (in the same directory)

This YAML file serves as "case law" - providing concrete implementation details while this QMD file defines the principles.

## Rationale

Without governance, directories proliferate organically, leading to:
- Confusion about where to place new files
- Duplicate or overlapping directories (e.g., `utils/`, `templates/` appearing in multiple places)
- Difficulty for AI agents to understand the codebase structure
- Maintenance burden from cleaning up unused directories

## Canonical Directory Structures

### Project Root (e.g., MAMBA/, WISER/) - Allowed Files

The project root directory should contain only essential application and configuration files:

```
{project_root}/
├── app.R                 # Main application entry point
├── app_config.yaml       # Application configuration
├── _targets_config.yaml  # Pipeline configuration (generated, git-ignored)
├── README.md            # Project overview
├── CLAUDE.md            # AI assistant guidelines
├── CLAUDE.local.md      # Local AI overrides (git-ignored)
├── manifest.json        # Deployment manifest
├── .gitignore           # Git ignore rules
├── .Rprofile            # R profile (optional)
├── .Renviron            # R environment (git-ignored)
├── scripts/             # All R/Python scripts
├── data/                # Company-specific data
├── validation/          # Validation outputs (CSV only, no .md)
├── www/                 # Static web assets
├── tests/               # Integration tests
└── .claude/             # Claude Code configuration
```

### Project Root - Prohibited Patterns

| Pattern | Destination | Reason |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| `*_REPORT.md` | `CHANGELOG/reports/` | Reports belong in CHANGELOG |
| `*_DEBUG*.md` | `CHANGELOG/reports/` | Debug reports are local evidence linked to GitHub issues |
| `*_GUIDE.md` | `CHANGELOG/features/` or docs | Guides should be organized |
| `MIGRATION_*.md` | `CHANGELOG/migrations/` | Migration docs belong in CHANGELOG |
| `test_*.R` | `scripts/global_scripts/98_test/` | Test scripts belong in 98_test |

### 00_principles/ - Allowed Directories

```
00_principles/
├── .claude/           # Claude Code configuration (agents, rules, skills, settings)
├── .quarto/           # Quarto build artifacts (auto-generated, gitignored)
├── CHANGELOG/         # Change history and issue resolutions
├── docs/              # Natural language documentation
│   ├── en/           # English version
│   │   ├── part1_principles/    # Core principles by chapter
│   │   └── part2_implementations/  # Implementation guides
│   └── zh/           # Chinese version (same structure)
├── llm/              # LLM-optimized YAML files for AI consumption
├── _quarto.yml       # Quarto configuration
├── INDEX.md          # Main index
├── README.md         # Overview
├── QUICK_REFERENCE.md  # Fast lookup guide
└── NAVIGATION.md     # Navigation helper
```

### 00_principles/ - Allowed Root Files

Only these files are permitted in the root directory:

| Category | Files |
|----------|-------|
| **System** | `.gitignore`, `.quartoignore` |
| **Quarto** | `_quarto.yml`, `_quarto-en.yml`, `_quarto-zh.yml`, `index.qmd`, `styles.css`, `parameters.yaml` |
| **Documentation** | `INDEX.md`, `README.md`, `QUICK_REFERENCE.md`, `NAVIGATION.md` |

### 00_principles/ - Prohibited File Patterns

| Pattern | Destination | Reason |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| `ISSUE_*.md` | GitHub Issues | Issues are tracked remotely; local issue files are legacy-only |
| `*_REPORT.md` | `CHANGELOG/reports/` | Reports belong in CHANGELOG |
| `*_DEBUG*.md` | `CHANGELOG/reports/` | Debug reports are issue evidence |
| `MIGRATION_*.md` | `CHANGELOG/migrations/` | Migration docs belong in CHANGELOG |
| `README_*.md` | `archive/` | Only one README.md allowed |
| `*.yaml` (except allowed) | `llm/` | YAML files belong in llm/ |

**Prohibited in 00_principles/**:
- `utils/` - Use `global_scripts/04_utils/` instead
- `templates/` - Use `global_scripts/templates/` instead
- `scripts/` - Use appropriate numbered directory in `global_scripts/`
- Any unnumbered utility directories

### global_scripts/ - Allowed Directories

```
global_scripts/
├── 00_principles/     # Principles system (see above)
├── 01_db/            # Database connection scripts
├── 02_db_utils/      # Database utilities
├── 03_config/        # Configuration loaders
├── 04_utils/         # General utilities
├── 05_etl_utils/     # ETL helper functions
├── 06_queries/       # Query templates
├── 07_models/        # Statistical models
├── 08_ai/            # AI integration
├── 09_python_scripts/ # Python scripts
├── 10_rshinyapp_components/  # Shiny UI components
├── 11_rshinyapp_utils/       # Shiny utilities
├── 12_bash/          # Shell scripts
├── 13_modules/       # Reusable modules
├── 14_sql_utils/     # SQL utilities
├── 15_cleanse/       # Data cleansing
├── 17_transform/     # Data transformation
├── 18_AIMETA_Language/  # AI meta-language
├── 19_CSS/           # Stylesheets
├── 20_R_packages/    # R package management
├── 21_rshinyapp_templates/  # App templates
├── 22_initializations/      # Initialization scripts
├── 23_deployment/    # Deployment scripts
├── 24_assets/        # Static assets
├── 25_scripts/       # Miscellaneous scripts
├── 26_platform_apis/ # Platform API integrations
├── 27_company_info/  # Company-specific data
├── 28_migration_scripts/    # Migration utilities
├── 96_things_todo/   # Pending tasks
├── 97_proposal/      # Proposals
├── 98_test/          # Test scripts
├── 99_archive/       # Archived code
├──X_global_data/      # Shared data files
├── nsql/             # NSQL language (subrepo)
└── templates/        # Global templates
```

**Reserved ranges**:
- `00-29`: Core functionality
- `30-89`: Reserved for future use (requires principle amendment)
- `90-99`: Meta-directories (test, archive, proposals)

## Enforcement Rules

### Rule 1: No Ad-Hoc Directory Creation
Before creating a new directory in `00_principles/` or `global_scripts/`:
1. Check if an existing directory serves the purpose
2. If not, propose amendment to this principle
3. Get explicit approval before creating

### Rule 2: Directory Purpose Documentation
Each numbered directory MUST have a README.md explaining:
- Purpose of the directory
- What files belong here
- What files do NOT belong here

### Rule 3: Periodic Audit
Quarterly review of directory structure to:
- Identify directories that have grown beyond original scope
- Archive unused directories
- Consolidate overlapping directories

## Implementation

### For AI Agents
When asked to create new files:
1. Check this principle for appropriate location
2. Never create new directories without explicit user approval
3. Prefer existing directories over creating new ones

### For Developers
When proposing new directories:
1. Document the need in a CHANGELOG entry
2. Reference this principle
3. Update this principle after approval

## Examples

### Correct Placement

| File Type | Correct Location |
|-----------|------------------|
| Database utility function | `02_db_utils/fn_*.R` |
| Shiny UI component | `10_rshinyapp_components/{component}/` |
| ETL helper | `05_etl_utils/` |
| Report template | `templates/TEMPLATE_*.md` |
| Principle document | `00_principles/docs/en/part1_principles/` |

### Incorrect (Avoid)

| Anti-pattern | Why Wrong | Correct Alternative |
|--------------|-----------|---------------------|
| `00_principles/utils/` | Utils belong in global_scripts | `04_utils/` |
| `00_principles/templates/` | Templates belong at root | `templates/` |
| `global_scripts/helpers/` | Unnumbered directory | `04_utils/` or numbered dir |
| `global_scripts/my_scripts/` | Personal namespace | Use appropriate numbered dir |

## Version History

| Version | Date | Changes |
|---------|------|---------|
| 1.2 | 2025-12-30 | Added project root directory governance; expanded CHANGELOG subdirectories |
| 1.1 | 2025-12-26 | Added root file governance; created companion spec YAML |
| 1.0 | 2025-12-26 | Initial creation after cleanup audit |
